title: Cha (disambiguation)
content:
'''Cha''' may refer to:

==Canon==
*[[Chanath Cha]], a [[Human]] female [[bounty hunter]]

==Legends==
===Individuals===
*[[Cha]], a [[Rellarin]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]].
*[[Cha Niathal]]; a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force|naval]] officer and politician during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]
*[[Cha Raas]]; a [[Human/Legends|Human]] agent of the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]
*[[Cha-Val Sha-Vak]]; a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] of unknown [[Species/Legends|species]] in service of [[Sibarra]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]
*[[Kadlah Cha]]; a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] of [[Domain Cha]] and an aide to Wyrpuuk Cha
*[[Namman Cha]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] during the [[Rebellion era]] and an aspiring [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]
*[[Wyrpuuk Cha]], a Yuuzhan Vong warrior of [[Domain Cha]] and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]

===Groups===
*[[Cha'a]], a reptilian species
*[[Domain Cha]], a Yuuzhan Vong [[domain]]
**[[Kadlah Cha]], a [[Warrior caste|warrior]] and an aide to Wyrpuuk Cha
**[[Wyrpuuk Cha]], a warrior and [[Commander/Legends|commander]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]

===Locations===
*[[Cha Raaba system]]

==See also==
*[[Sha (disambiguation)]]
